# AI Context for @json-express/api-rest

This package generates RESTful routes based on the registered `defineModel` schemas.

## Setup
```typescript
import { ApiRest } from '@json-express/api-rest';
kernel.registerApiGenerator(new ApiRest());
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not write custom Express or Fastify route handlers. Instead, define your models and `api-rest` will automatically generate full CRUD endpoints (`GET`, `POST`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`).
- It automatically honors the `access` block defined in the schemas.
